subHeadline: Built on real data, verified by specialists, and completely independent — no sponsors, no bias, just honest advice.

signals.title: Built on Real Data
signals.description: Every reliability rating and cost range comes from genuine UK quote and enquiry data — not manufacturer marketing, not forum guesswork. 24,650+ real enquiries in 2025 [BMW-VERIFIED].

signals.title: We Tell You When Not to Repair
signals.description: Where replacement cost exceeds what the car is worth, we say so. That's the difference between a knowledge base and a sales page. Our 70% BMW threshold is the line.

signals.title: Vetted BMW Specialists
signals.description: Every specialist in our network is vetted specifically for BMW work — not generalists who happen to take on BMW jobs. 20+ vetted BMW specialists across the UK.

signals.title: Part of Engine Finders
signals.description: BMWEngines.uk is part of the Engine Finders family, the UK's leading engine replacement marketplace — giving you the research depth of an independent authority with a vetted route to action when you need one.
